system_prompt:
You are Auditor-One, an elite AI website auditor working for EIGHT25MEDIA.
Your goal is to provide deeply analytical, strictly factual insights and actionable recommendations for a given webpage.

You will receive:
1. FACTUAL SCRAPED METRICS JSON: Deterministic data about the page.
2. AGENCY_HEURISTICS_TO_ENFORCE: Critical rules that the page has violated.
3. PAGE CONTENT (MARKDOWN): The semantic structure and text of the page.

OUTPUT FORMAT — FOLLOW THIS EXACTLY:

Write your analysis using EXACTLY these 5 Markdown sections in this order. Each must be its own ## heading:

## SEO Structure
[Analyse title tag (title_length: ideal 30-60 chars), meta description (description_length: ideal 70-160 chars), H1/H2 count, heading hierarchy, and link equity based on the scraped metrics. Flag if title or description length is outside the ideal range.]

## Messaging Clarity
[Analyse whether the page copy clearly communicates the value proposition and target audience.]

## CTA Usage
[Analyse the cta_count, button placement, and conversion opportunities.]

## Content Depth
[Analyse word_count, images, alt text coverage, and informational density.]

## UX Concerns
[Identify structural or usability issues based on the page structure and missing elements.]

RULES:
- You MUST produce all 5 sections above, each under its own ## heading. Do NOT merge any two sections.
- Ground every insight in the provided factual data. Do NOT hallucinate metrics.
- After completing ALL 5 sections, output EXACTLY the following delimiter alone on its own line with nothing else on that line:
---REC_SPLIT---
- Immediately after that delimiter line, output a valid JSON array (no markdown code fences) of 3-5 recommendations.
  Each item must have exactly these keys:
  {"priority": 1, "category": "SEO", "issue": "...", "actionable_recommendation": "...", "metric_reference": "..."}
- In the recommendations JSON array, the "priority" integer values must be strictly unique, contiguous, and sequential, starting from 1 (e.g. 1 for the highest priority, 2 for the second highest, 3, etc.). Never assign the same priority value to multiple items.
- Do NOT output anything after the JSON array.
user_prompt:
### FACTUAL SCRAPED METRICS JSON
```json
{
  "word_count": 708,
  "headings": {
    "h1": 1,
    "h2": 14,
    "h3": 5
  },
  "links": {
    "internal": 6,
    "external": 5
  },
  "cta_count": 13,
  "images": {
    "total": 2,
    "missing_alt": 0,
    "missing_alt_percentage": 0.0
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "DocFlex AI | Home",
    "description": "DocFlex AI is an AI-powered healthcare platform. Get medical insights, prescription support, drug interaction checks, and clinical decision support for doctors, pharmacists, nurses, and medical students.",
    "title_length": 17,
    "description_length": 203
  }
}
```

### AGENCY_HEURISTICS_TO_ENFORCE
- AGENCY RULE: Excessive CTAs detected. More than 8 CTAs creates user decision paralysis and degrades overall conversion rate.

### PAGE CONTENT (MARKDOWN)
Next-Gen Medical AI

# Transform Healthcare with AI

Instant answers from an AI trained in medical knowledge. No more endless flipping through books. ⚡ Quick insights • 🎯 Confident decisions care

Try it now Watch demo

E

L

Z

M
Trusted by 1K+ Healthcare Professionals

About Us

## Shaping the future of Medical Intelligence

DocFlex AI is Sri Lanka’s first medical AI platform, designed to transform how healthcare professionals access essential drug information. Built and developed by Team DocFlex, it serves as a trusted, efficient, and intelligent medical assistant, empowering better decision-making in clinical practice.

## Our Goal

DocFlex AI aims to save healthcare professionals valuable time by streamlining access to essential medical information. Our goal is to enhance daily workflows through intelligent assistance, provide a smoother and more reliable user experience, and deliver accurate answers backed by trusted references such as the BNF, BNFC, BP, and etc for improved clarity.

## Features and Accuracy

DocFlex AI maintains a strong 98% accuracy rate, supported by continuous model training and improvements. Every response includes clear references for instant verification, ensuring reliability. User feedback is essential reporting incorrect details through the feedback section helps refine our system and preserve DocFlex AI as a trusted resource.

## The Future of DocFlex AI

We are focused on making DocFlex AI more user-friendly while steadily expanding its features. Future plans include collaborating with healthcare institutions and professionals to enhance accuracy, reliability, and real-world performance. As the platform evolves, DocFlex AI will offer smarter, faster, and continually improving support for medical practice

Pricing Plans

## Flexible options to fit your needs

Choose from our affordable pricing plans designed to suit individuals, teams, and enterprises. Pay only for what you need with no hidden fees.

### Free

Contact Us

## Get in touch - We’re here to help

Have a question, suggestion, or need support? Our team is ready to assist you. Drop us a message, and we’ll respond as quickly as possible.

Name

Email

Contact Number

Subject

Your Message
Send Message

FAQ

## Frequently Asked Questions

Here are some of the most common questions we get, along with clear answers to help you out.

## Is there a mobile app available?

Currently, there is no dedicated DocFlex AI mobile app. However, you can access the platform seamlessly through any mobile or desktop web browser. A fully optimized mobile application is under development and will be released soon. For quicker access in the meantime, you can install DocFlex AI as a Web App on your device.

## Who can use this platform?

DocFlex AI is built for all healthcare professionals, including Doctors, Pharmacists, Nurses, Medical Students, and other clinical staff. Pharmacists can upload prescription images, check drug interactions, verify dosage guidelines, and explore NMRA-registered medicines using the Med-Wallet feature. Students can also use DocFlex AI for learning, revision, and exam preparation.

## Can I cancel my plan after purchase?

No. Plans are offered as non-recurring, one-time purchases; therefore, cancellations are not applicable once activated.

## How accurate is the platform?

DocFlex AI is designed for high medical accuracy. All answers are generated using trusted medical references such as the BNF, BNFC, and the British Pharmacopoeia. Each response includes transparent reference previews, allowing you to verify information instantly and ensure clinical reliability.

## As a beginner, how do I know how to use this platform?

No worries. Once you log in to the system, you will find a User Manual tab in the sidebar. Please refer to it for guidance.

## What if the answer I need is not available?

If certain information is not available in our database, DocFlex AI automatically uses the built-in Deep Web Search feature. This tool fetches up-to-date, evidence-based data from reputable medical websites, helping you find accurate and reliable answers quickly.

## How can users help improve the platform?

Your feedback directly contributes to improving DocFlex AI. You can submit suggestions, feature requests, comments, or issues through the Feedback tab. Every submission helps us enhance accuracy, performance, and overall user experience.
raw_llm_output:
## SEO Structure
The title tag "DocFlex AI | Home" has a length of 17 characters, which is within the ideal range of 30-60 characters but on the lower end. The meta description has a length of 203 characters, exceeding the ideal range of 70-160 characters. The page has a single H1 heading and 14 H2 headings, indicating a clear structure. However, the excessive number of H2 headings might dilute the importance of each section. The link equity is distributed among 6 internal and 5 external links.

## Messaging Clarity
The page copy clearly communicates the value proposition of DocFlex AI as a medical AI platform designed for healthcare professionals. It highlights the platform's features, such as instant answers, confident decisions, and trusted references. The target audience is also well-defined, including doctors, pharmacists, nurses, medical students, and other clinical staff. However, the page could benefit from a more concise and prominent statement of the platform's unique selling proposition.

## CTA Usage
The page has 13 CTAs, which exceeds the recommended limit of 8 CTAs. This might create user decision paralysis and degrade the overall conversion rate. The CTAs are placed throughout the page, but their prominence and visibility could be improved. The page offers various conversion opportunities, such as "Try it now," "Watch demo," and "Contact Us." However, the excessive number of CTAs might overwhelm the user and reduce the effectiveness of each individual CTA.

## Content Depth
The page has a word count of 708, indicating a moderate level of content depth. The page includes 2 images, both with alt text, which is a good practice for accessibility and SEO. The informational density is high, with a clear structure and concise paragraphs. However, the page could benefit from more visual elements, such as diagrams, infographics, or videos, to break up the text and enhance user engagement.

## UX Concerns
The page structure is generally clear, but the excessive number of CTAs and H2 headings might create visual noise and overwhelm the user. The page could benefit from a more prominent and concise headline, as well as a clearer call-to-action. The pricing plans section is well-structured, but the tables could be improved for better readability. The contact form and FAQ section are also well-organized, but the page could benefit from a more prominent display of the platform's unique features and benefits.

---REC_SPLIT---
[
  {"priority": 1, "category": "SEO", "issue": "Meta description length exceeds ideal range", "actionable_recommendation": "Rewrite the meta description to fit within the 70-160 character limit", "metric_reference": "description_length"},
  {"priority": 2, "category": "CTA Optimization", "issue": "Excessive number of CTAs", "actionable_recommendation": "Reduce the number of CTAs to 8 or fewer and prioritize the most important conversion opportunities", "metric_reference": "cta_count"},
  {"priority": 3, "category": "Content Enhancement", "issue": "Limited visual elements", "actionable_recommendation": "Add more visual elements, such as diagrams, infographics, or videos, to break up the text and enhance user engagement", "metric_reference": "images.total"},
  {"priority": 4, "category": "UX Improvement", "issue": "Visual noise and overwhelm", "actionable_recommendation": "Simplify the page structure, reduce the number of H2 headings, and prioritize the most important content and CTAs", "metric_reference": "headings.h2"},
  {"priority": 5, "category": "Messaging Clarity", "issue": "Lack of concise unique selling proposition", "actionable_recommendation": "Develop a clear and concise statement of the platform's unique selling proposition and display it prominently on the page", "metric_reference": "metadata.title"}
]
